hero.description: Expert service in robotic surgery, gynecological oncology, high-risk pregnancies and advanced laparoscopic surgery with 23 years of experience.

services.title: Our Treatment Areas
services.subtitle: Expert service in every area of women's health with the most advanced methods of modern medicine
services.roboticSurgeryDesc: Minimally invasive surgeries with state-of-the-art robotic surgery systems. Less pain, faster recovery.
services.gynecologicalOncologyDesc: Expert surgical approach in the diagnosis and treatment of female reproductive system cancers.
services.fibroidTreatmentDesc: Solutions for fibroid problems with modern treatment methods including scarless fibroid surgery.
services.endometriosisDesc: Advanced laparoscopic surgery experience in endometriosis and chocolate cyst treatment.
services.highRiskPregnancyDesc: Safe outcomes with 23 years of experience in monitoring and managing high-risk pregnancies.
services.hpvColposcopyDesc: HPV diagnosis and treatment, early detection with colposcopy and preventive approaches.

about.description: Assoc. Prof. Dr. Erkan Elçi is an Obstetrics and Gynecology specialist based in Istanbul, with extensive experience in minimally invasive gynecological surgery, gynecological cancer surgery and advanced laparoscopic operations. He currently works at Yeni Yüzyıl University Medicana Ataköy Hospital.

whyChooseUs.title: Why Assoc. Prof. Dr. Erkan Elçi?
whyChooseUs.reason1Desc: Extensive clinical experience in obstetrics and gynecology
whyChooseUs.reason2Desc: Robotic surgery and advanced laparoscopic surgery capabilities
whyChooseUs.reason3Desc: Over 50 international scientific publications and research
whyChooseUs.reason4Desc: Personalized treatment plans tailored to each patient

faq.q1: How can I book an appointment?
faq.a1: You can call us at +90 530 403 69 77 or reach us via WhatsApp to book an appointment. You can also use the contact form on our website.
faq.a2: Please contact us for current information about consultation fees. We have a Social Security agreement.
faq.q3: What is robotic surgery and what are its advantages?
faq.a3: Robotic surgery is a minimally invasive surgical method performed by the surgeon through robotic arms. It has advantages such as less pain, less bleeding, smaller incisions, faster recovery and less scarring.
faq.q4: How long is the recovery period after surgery?
faq.a4: While the recovery period varies depending on the type of surgery, with laparoscopic and robotic surgical methods, patients can generally return to daily activities within 1-2 weeks.
faq.a5: Yes, we offer online video consultation for our patients coming from abroad or other cities. Please contact us for an appointment.
faq.q6: Which hospital do you work at?
faq.a6: I practice at Yeni Yüzyıl University Medicana Ataköy Hospital.
